long_description:
# Auto Crystal

Perfect for PvP crystal combat.

## Features

- ✅ **Automatic Attack** - Instantly attacks crystals when you place them
- ✅ **Toggle Control** - Press C to enable/disable
- ✅ **Visual Feedback** - Chat messages show ON/OFF status
- ✅ **PvP Optimized** - Designed for crystal PvP combat

## How It Works

Place it on obsidian or bedrock.
The mod automatically attacks it to explode it.
No manual clicking required!

## Controls

- **C Key**: Toggle Auto Crystal on/off
name: Auto Crystal
summary: Hate having to manually attack every End Crystal after placing it? This mod makes it so that it automatically attacks crystals for you, toggle with C key.
